name: Bridge
description: Lie on back knees bent. Lift hips to form straight line from knees to shoulders. Lower and repeat.

name: Cat/cow stretch
description: On hands and knees alternate between arching and rounding the back.

name: Lumbar rotation in crook lying
description: Lie on back knees bent. Rotate both knees side to side keeping upper body still.

name: Back row in standing (exercise band)
description: Stand holding exercise band fixed in front. Pull elbows back squeezing shoulder blades together.

name: Bird Dog
description: On hands and knees raise one arm and opposite leg simultaneously while keeping back straight.

name: Bridge (heels only)
description: Like bridge but with only heels on the floor. Lift hips forming straight line from knees to shoulders.

name: Calf raise
description: Stand feet shoulder width apart. Rise onto toes then lower heels.

name: Single leg bridge
description: Bridge on one leg. Lift other foot off mat and raise hips while keeping balance.

name: Bike ergometer
description: Cycle on stationary bike for prescribed duration.

name: Knee extension in sitting (exercise band)
description: Sit with band around foot fixed behind. Straighten leg then lower slowly.

name: Clams (exercise band)
description: Lie on side band above knees. Rotate top knee up and away keeping feet together.

name: Child's pose stretch
description: Kneel reach arms forward and lower chest. Hold to feel stretch in lower back.

name: AROM hip abduction in side lying
description: Lie on side lift top leg upward keeping it straight then lower back down.

name: Thoracic rotation in four point kneeling (reaching)
description: On hands and knees reach one arm under body then open up to the sky rotating through upper back.

name: Pelvic tilt in crook lying
description: Lie on back. Alternate between arching and flattening lower back by tilting pelvis.

name: Pallof press in standing
description: Stand holding band fixed at chest height. Extend arms forward resisting the pull then return.

name: Single leg calf raise
description: Balance on one leg. Rise onto toes then lower heel.

name: Wall Sit
description: Back against wall slide down to squat position. Hold for prescribed time.

name: Knee rocks
description: Lie on back knees bent. Rock both knees side to side keeping upper body flat.

name: Shoulder external rotation in standing (exercise band)
description: Elbow at side rotate arm outward against band resistance then return.

name: Side Plank
description: Lie on side prop up on elbow. Lift hips forming straight line from head to ankles.

name: Calf raise with support
description: Stand behind chair holding for support. Rise onto toes then lower heels.

name: Knee extension (cable machine)
description: Sit at machine pad on shins. Raise legs until straight then lower slowly.

name: Dead bugs
description: Lie on back arms and legs raised. Lower opposite arm and leg toward floor then return.

name: Inner range knee extension in standing (exercise band)
description: Stand with band around knee. Straighten leg against band resistance without locking knee.

name: Clams (basic)
description: Lie on side knees bent 45 degrees. Lift top knee keeping feet together then lower.

name: Shoulder internal rotation in standing (exercise band)
description: Elbow at side rotate arm inward toward stomach against band resistance then return.

name: Bridge (exercise band above knees)
description: Bridge with band above knees. Lift hips keeping knees apart against band.

name: Single leg calf raise with support
description: Hold chair for support. Balance on one leg rise onto toes then lower.

name: Crab walks (exercise band around feet)
description: Band around feet half squat position. Walk sideways maintaining squat.

name: Bulgarian split squat (dumbbells)
description: One foot on bench behind. Lower into lunge then push through front heel to stand.

name: Straight leg raise in supine
description: Lie on back lift one straight leg toward body then lower slowly.

name: Plank
description: Rest on elbows and toes forming straight line from head to feet. Hold for prescribed time.

name: Single leg bridge (on heel)
description: Single leg bridge with only heel on floor. Lift hips forming straight line.

name: Hamstring curl in prone (cable machine)
description: Lie on stomach at machine pad on heels. Pull heels toward hips then lower.

name: Single leg stance
description: Stand on one leg hands on hips. Balance for prescribed time then switch.

name: Single leg knee extension (cable machine)
description: Sit at machine on one leg pad on shin. Raise leg until straight then lower.

name: 90 Degree leg press
description: Sit in leg press. Push through heels to extend legs then slowly return.

name: Back row in sitting (cable narrow neutral grip)
description: Sit at cable feet on rest. Pull handles to sides squeezing shoulder blades.

name: Squat
description: Feet shoulder width chest tall. Bend into full squat then push through heels to stand.

name: Bicep curl in standing (dumbbells)
description: Stand palms facing forward. Curl hands to shoulders then lower.

name: Hip abduction in kneeling side plank
description: Side plank on knee. Lift top straight leg up then lower keeping toes pointing down.

name: Sit to stand (arms across chest)
description: Sit on chair arms crossed. Lean forward and push through heels to stand then sit.

name: Goblet squat (kettlebell)
description: Hold kettlebell at chest feet wide. Squat keeping chest tall then stand.

name: Crab walks (exercise band around knees)
description: Band above knees half squat. Walk sideways maintaining squat and tension.

name: Romanian deadlift (loaded barbell)
description: Stand behind barbell. Hinge at hips keeping back straight lower bar then stand.

name: Split Squat
description: Feet staggered step forward. Lower into lunge then push through front heel to stand.
